title: guard-jj-mutating Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation guide for adding a PreToolUse/Bash hook that blocks jj op restore/abandon in jj repos unless approved with # jj-op-approved marker.
notes: Planning/implementation guide document. Structured as task breakdown with step-by-step developer instructions. References separate spec document defining the actual requirements. Not a specification of final product behavior, but a guide for how to build it.
